metadata.description: Maps each deduplicated threat to its discovering Phase B specialists for confidence analysis

TECH-H001.title: AgentDAO Vacuous Success: Proposals Auto-Succeed When Token TotalSupply is 0 at Snapshot
TECH-H001.duplicate_group_description: AgentDAO.state() returns Succeeded when forVotes == getPastTotalSupply and both are 0, allowing vacuous proposal success and immediate execution without votes

ECON-H002.title: FERC20 burnFrom Does Not Decrement totalSupply Creating Supply Mismatch at Graduation
ECON-H002.duplicate_group_description: FERC20.burnFrom/_burn decrements balances but never decrements _totalSupply, corrupting supply accounting and graduation token parameters

ECON-H005.title: Bonding.launch() Permanently Broken Due to Double NonReentrant Guard
ECON-H005.duplicate_group_description: Bonding.launch() always reverts due to nested nonReentrant modifier when calling launchFor(), forcing use of launchFor() with arbitrary creator attribution

TECH-H005.title: AgentTax.dcaSell Uses Incorrect Slippage Calculation Based on Input Amount
TECH-H005.duplicate_group_description: AgentTax.dcaSell calculates minOutput based on input amount instead of expected output, providing incorrect slippage protection

TECH-H006.title: Deliberate Vote Type Enables Double-Voting in AgentDAO and VirtualGenesisDAO
TECH-H006.duplicate_group_description: Deliberate VoteType (support=3) returns without setting hasVoted, enabling double-voting in governance

TECH-H007.title: Genesis.participate Per-Transaction Cap Not Per-User: Whales Can Dominate Allocation
TECH-H007.duplicate_group_description: Genesis.participate enforces maxContributionVirtualAmount per-transaction not per-user, allowing whales to bypass the cap via repeated calls

OPS-H013.title: Unrestricted ContributionNft minting enables on-chain spoofing of rejected/active proposals into the contribution graph
OPS-H013.duplicate_group_description: ContributionNft.mint allows minting for non-succeeded proposals since it only checks proposalProposer without verifying proposal state

TECH-H014.title: Bonding.unwrapToken allows anyone to force-convert arbitrary holders by burning their FERC20 and pulling agent tokens from pair
TECH-H014.duplicate_group_description: Bonding.unwrapToken is public with no access control, allowing anyone to force-convert arbitrary users' FERC20 tokens to agent tokens without consent

TECH-H010.title: Airdrop Contract Missing Array Length Validation and Total Reconciliation
TECH-H010.duplicate_group_description: Airdrop.airdrop uses assembly without validating _recipients.length == _amounts.length or sum(amounts) == _total, causing misdirected transfers and stranded tokens

TECH-H011.title: Bonding.buy() and sell() Missing nonReentrant: State Updates After External Calls
TECH-H011.duplicate_group_description: Bonding.buy() and sell() lack nonReentrant modifier at the Bonding contract level, with state updates occurring after external router calls

ECON-H014.title: BondingTax swapForAsset Sandwich Attack via Spot Price Slippage
ECON-H014.duplicate_group_description: BondingTax.swapForAsset uses manipulatable spot price from router.getAmountsOut for slippage protection, enabling flash loan sandwich attacks

ECON-H009.title: AgentDAO.getMaturity Division By Zero Bricks Service NFT Minting
ECON-H009.duplicate_group_description: AgentDAO.getMaturity divides by forVotes without zero check, reverting when called by ServiceNft.mint for proposals with zero for-votes

ECON-H012.title: ServiceNft Impact Score Griefing via Public updateImpact
ECON-H012.duplicate_group_description: ServiceNft.updateImpact is publicly callable and can zero out impact scores by re-invoking after mint when _coreServices already points to the current proposalId

OPS-H006.title: FGenesis.createGenesis Permissionless Grants BONDING_ROLE on AgentFactoryV3
OPS-H006.duplicate_group_description: FGenesis.createGenesis is permissionless and automatically grants BONDING_ROLE on AgentFactoryV3 to each new Genesis contract

OPS-H017.title: promptMulti caches agentTba incorrectly when agentIds repeat non-contiguously, potentially sending payments to the wrong agent TBA
OPS-H017.duplicate_group_description: AgentInference.promptMulti never updates prevAgentId in the loop, causing broken TBA caching and potential payment misrouting

OPS-H018.title: FRouter lacks any on-chain validation that a pair exists, enabling executor-triggered DoS via zero-address pair interactions
OPS-H018.duplicate_group_description: FRouter functions do not validate that factory.getPair returns a non-zero address, causing reverts on missing pairs

TECH-H002.title: Genesis.onGenesisSuccess Repeatable: Operator Can Overwrite User Token Claims

TECH-H003.title: FERC20 burnFrom Does Not Decrement totalSupply, Corrupting Graduation Token Parameters

TECH-H004.title: Bonding.launch() Always Reverts Due to Double nonReentrant Modifier

TECH-H008.title: ContributionNft.mint Allows Minting for Non-Accepted (Rejected/Active) Proposals

TECH-H009.title: AgentDAO._tryAutoExecute Causes Voter DoS When Proposal Target Reverts

TECH-H012.title: Genesis.withdrawLeftAssetsAfterFinalized Can Drain Unclaimed Agent Tokens

TECH-H013.title: Vacuous success + auto-execute in AgentDAO can allow immediate execution of proposals when vote token totalSupply snapshot is zero

TECH-H015.title: ContributionNft.mint can create NFTs for unaccepted or even active/defeated proposals, polluting contribution graph and downstream logic

TECH-H016.title: FRouter.graduate can be abused by any EXECUTOR_ROLE to drain all assetToken from a pair regardless of token state

TECH-H017.title: FPair.mint initializes k = reserve0*reserve1 without overflow protection; extreme params could brick pair or misprice

TECH-H018.title: TBABonus.updateBonusRate emits swapped old/new values, potentially breaking off-chain accounting and bonus governance controls
